en.extract:
The speckled tinkerbird (Pogoniulus scolopaceus) is a species of bird in the Lybiidae family (African barbets).
It is widespread across the African tropical rainforest.

[[File:Speckled tinkerbirds (Pogoniulus scolopaceus) Nyamebe Bepo.jpg|thumb|Nyamebe Bepo Forest Reserve, Ashanti Region, Ghana]]
The '''speckled tinkerbird''' ('''''Pogoniulus scolopaceus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the [[Lybiidae]] family (African barbets).

It is widespread across the [[Tropical rainforest|African tropical rainforest]].
